title: Quiz: Gate Scheduling
description: Test your understanding of gate scheduling

questions.question: ASAP scheduling means:
questions.explanation: ASAP executes each gate at the earliest possible time.

questions.question: RZ gates typically have duration:
questions.explanation: RZ is often a virtual gate implemented by frame tracking.

questions.question: ALAP scheduling helps reduce qubit idle time before measurement.
questions.explanation: ALAP delays operations, reducing decoherence before measurement.

questions.question: Dynamical decoupling sequences are inserted:
questions.explanation: DD fills idle time to protect against decoherence.
